title: Mobile user has few headsets, some disconnected
scenario: Lens tenant Inventory and user profile pages correctly display green/red status indicators for multiple paired headsets when some are disconnected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Lens tenant web portal and navigate to the Inventory page.
2. Pair 3 or more Poly Bluetooth headsets with the Poly Studio Mobile Android app.
3. Ensure at least one headset is actively connected (powered on and paired).
4. Turn off or unpair at least one of the other headsets so it is disconnected.
5. On the Inventory page, observe the status indicator for each headset.
6. Navigate to the Inventory/Device Profile page for an active headset and observe its status indicator.
7. Navigate to the Inventory/Device Profile page for a disconnected headset and observe its status indicator.
8. Navigate to the Device Users/User Profile page and observe the status indicators for all paired headsets.
expected: Active headsets display a green status mark. Disconnected headsets (turned off or unpaired) display a red/inactive status mark on the Inventory page, Inventory/Device Profile page, and Device Users/User Profile page.
